verse_text: Our fathers worshiped on this mountain, and you Jews say that in Jerusalem is the place where one ought to worship.'

pericope.title: The Preaching of John the Baptist

links.context: "God, then, being immaterial and uncircumscribed, has no place. For He is His own place, filling all things" (JohnDm; see also [[JOH.4:20]]-24).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: , 7 Samaritans were among the first to repent and receive the gospel ([[JOH.4:1]]-42). Therefore, this prophecy is ultimately fulfilled in the Church, Christ's vineyard.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
